title: lanugothamnus patens
intro: Lanugothamnus patens, also known as the woolly bush, is a shrub native to Australia that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is characterized by its fragrant, white flowers and soft, woolly foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lanugothamnus patens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
